mapper.select:
select * from sys_user
and role_type = #{roleType}
and (username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, real_name, phone, email, avatar, gender, role_type, status) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{roleType}, #{status})
mapper.update: update sys_user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, role_type = #{roleType}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from stage_template
and business_type = #{businessType}
and template_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into stage_template (template_name, business_type, remark, status) values (#{templateName}, #{businessType}, #{remark}, #{status})
mapper.select:
select fc.*, u.real_name as owner_name, u.role_type as creator_role_type from farming_cycle fc left join sys_user u on fc.user_id = u.id
and fc.business_type = #{businessType}
and (fc.cycle_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or fc.item_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by fc.id asc
select fc.*, u.real_name as owner_name, u.role_type as creator_role_type from farming_cycle fc left join sys_user u on fc.user_id = u.id where fc.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into farming_cycle (user_id, business_type, item_id, item_name, cycle_name, scale_value, scale_unit, start_date, expected_end_date, actual_end_date, status, is_public, description) values (#{userId}, #{businessType}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{cycleName}, #{scaleValue}, #{scaleUnit}, #{startDate}, #{expectedEndDate}, #{actualEndDate}, #{status}, #{isPublic}, #{description})
mapper.update: update farming_cycle set user_id = #{userId}, business_type = #{businessType}, item_id = #{itemId}, item_name = #{itemName}, cycle_name = #{cycleName}, scale_value = #{scaleValue}, scale_unit = #{scaleUnit}, start_date = #{startDate}, expected_end_date = #{expectedEndDate}, actual_end_date = #{actualEndDate}, status = #{status}, is_public = #{isPublic}, description = #{description} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from product_category where status = 'ENABLED' order by id asc

select * from product_category
and status = #{status}
and category_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by id asc

select p.*, u.real_name as seller_name, c.category_name from product_info p left join sys_user u on p.seller_id = u.id left join product_category c on p.category_id = c.id
and p.status = #{status}
and (p.product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.category_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by p.id asc
select p.*, u.real_name as seller_name, c.category_name from product_info p left join sys_user u on p.seller_id = u.id left join product_category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into product_info (product_name, category_id, seller_id, seller_type, source_cycle_id, price, stock, unit, main_image, description, sales_count, status) values (#{productName}, #{categoryId}, #{sellerId}, #{sellerType}, #{sourceCycleId}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{unit}, #{mainImage}, #{description}, #{salesCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: update product_info set product_name = #{productName}, category_id = #{categoryId}, seller_id = #{sellerId}, seller_type = #{sellerType}, source_cycle_id = #{sourceCycleId}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, unit = #{unit}, main_image = #{mainImage}, description = #{description}, sales_count = #{salesCount}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from banner_info
and status = #{status}
and title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by sort_no asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into banner_info (title, image_url, link_url, sort_no, status) values (#{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sortNo}, #{status})
mapper.update: update banner_info set title = #{title}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from notice_info
and publish_status = #{publishStatus}
and title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into notice_info (title, content, publish_status) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{publishStatus})
